basic_details.job_title: SDAU Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Senior Research Fellow/ Junior Research Fellow Posts
basic_details.post_name: Senior Research Fellow / Junior Research Fellow
basic_details.short_information: Sardarkrushinagar Dantiwada Agricultural University (SDAU) Senior Research Fellow / Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of SDAU. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced through the SDAU Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. (Horti.), M. Sc. (Biochemistry), M. Tech (Food Process Technology), M. Sc. (Food & Nutrition)
qualification.details: Senior Research Fellow (SRF): M.Sc. (Horti.) or M. Sc. (Biochemistry), or M. Tech (Food Process Technology) or M. Sc. (Food & Nutrition) Junior Research Fellow (JRF): M.Sc. (Horti.) or M. Sc. (Biochemistry), or M. Tech (Food Process Technology) or M. Sc. (Food & Nutrition)

salary_details.details: Senior Research Fellow (SRF): Rs. 31,000/- + HRA Per Month Junior Research Fellow (JRF): Rs. 31,000/- (Fix) Per Month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for SDAU Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 07-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for SDAU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the SDAU Recruitment 2026 is 07-06-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in SDAU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies for the posts of Senior Research Fellow and Junior Research Fellow.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess an M.Sc. in Horticulture, Biochemistry, Food Process Technology, or Food & Nutrition.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Senior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Senior Research Fellow post is Rs. 31,000/- plus HRA per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Junior Research Fellow post is a fixed amount of Rs. 31,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for SDAU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category of candidates for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted via email.

faq.question: Q8. When is the walk-in interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the SDAU Recruitment 2026 is scheduled for 09-06-2026.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the location of the job?
faq.answer: The job location is Mundra, Gujarat, with the pincode 370421.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of Sardarkrushinagar Dantiwada Agricultural University?
faq.answer: The official website of Sardarkrushinagar Dantiwada Agricultural University is sdau.edu.in.
